name: Casa Acosta
description:
Casa Acosta - the best views in Estepona on the New Golden Mile!

The apartment:

This 2 Bed has one of the best panoramic sea views of the Costa del sol!

The spacious apartment is situated on the new golden mile between Estepona and Marbella in the well known residential urbanization of Acosta Los Flamingos and opposite the prestigious Hotel Villa Padierna, Benahavis.

The complex offers secure underground parking and a beautiful pool area with communal sunbeds and incredible views over the mountains, the golf valley to the sea, Gibraltar, and the coast of Morocco.

The apartment is arranged over one floor with a lift to the parking and pool area.

The apartment offers a fresh, fully equipped kitchen with a separate utility room. The spacious lounge is tastefully furnished with a dining table, chairs and a sofa, carefully positioned to enjoy the view at all times. There is also a smart TV and WIFI.

The lounge leads out onto the southwest facing covered terrace which is furnished with a dining table  and an outside lounge. There is glass balustrading offering stunning uninterrupted panoramic views over the valley.

The master bedroom is furnished with a double bed and has an ensuite bathroom including a showering bath and separate shower cubicle. The guest bedroom is furnished with 2 single beds and has use of the guest bathroom fitted with a bath with an overhead shower unit.

There is aircon and wifi throughout and a large garaged parking for 1 car.

The apartment perfectly combines comfort  with exceptional views and offers 24 hour community security.

The complex boasts 2 beautiful communal swimming pools and 2 padel-tennis courts.

The Location:

This stunning hillside location offers breathtaking views of the sea, golf courses, natural lake and mountains. The apartment is perfectly located to discover all the highlights the Costa del Sol has to offer: Marbella, with it’s renowned Old Town, Puerto Banus, World UNESCO site Ronda, Gibraltar, the famous white andalusian villages like Mijas, and Benahavis  - the so called "culinary capital of Andalucia“ with it’s many restaurants some of which have Michelin stars . Estepona with its long sandy beaches, old town and beautiful harbour is only 10 minutes away and and the apartment is only 5 minutes from El Saladillo Beach and the Senda Litoral a coastal path stretching for miles perfect for joggers, biking or just walking and exploring the many chiringuitos the coast of Estepona has to offer. Within 3 minutes you will find various supermarkets, as well as the village of cancelada with local and international restaurants.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.

We look forward to welcoming you!
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
